Bolt.guidance: Review `packages.x86_64` to ensure the introduction of section comments (`# Base System`) does not degrade the Rust tooling's stream-based parsing performance. Ensure `tools/neos-profile-audit` skips commented lines early without allocating.

Palette.guidance: Ensure that the 'Architecture Limitations' added to `README.md` and `docs/HANDBOOK.md` use clear bulleted lists and do not introduce cognitive overload. Maintain the 'Windows-familiar' framing while clearly denoting `x86_64` as the only supported GUI tier.

Sentinel.guidance: Verify that all updated documentation URLs explicitly point to `https://github.com/uthsarad/NeOS` and do not inadvertently introduce malicious links or path traversal concepts. The project organization must be correct.
